exhibits_walked.name: Operating Agreement with Undertaking and Guarantee

clauses_extracted.duration: Shorter of 15 years or remaining lease term

clauses_extracted.obligation: 5% CLF + up to 6% SPF + 18% interest on overdue + $50 late fees
Must authorize EFT; Company designates amount
Must use only approved products; Company can designate single source
Must purchase, install, maintain EPOS from designated sources; must pay for all updates; no limit on upgrade frequency/cost
Consent required; $6,000 fee; ROFR; general release; sign then-current agreement
Stop marks; pay amounts; purchase option at appraised value; 1-year noncompete
All owners; joint and several; full performance; unlimited; survives bankruptcy
Arbitration in Minneapolis; injunctive relief; jury trial waiver; prevailing party fees
Neither party liable for delays from acts of God, strikes, embargoes, government orders
1 year from discovery or 2 years from act (whichever earlier); exceptions for underreporting, indemnification, trademark

deferred_sections.why_deferred: Key operative burdens (term, fees, transfer, termination, noncompete, guarantee, dispute resolution, force majeure) are already covered through targeted page reads and Item 17 cross-references. Remaining sections cover operational details (site development §5, operations standards §6, training §7, advertising §8, reporting §9) which are substantively covered in FDD Items 7, 8, 11, 15, 16.
deferred_sections.substance_recovered_elsewhere: Item 17 chart provides comprehensive summary of all key franchise relationship provisions. A2 contract burden depth pass directly read §§4, 6.5-6.7, 9.6-9.7, 10.5, 11, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16, plus Undertaking and Guarantee.
deferred_sections.remaining_missing: Detailed site development provisions (§5), modernization timing (§5.5), detailed insurance minimums (§10.3), detailed confidentiality provisions (§6.12). These are operational rather than buyer-critical economic or legal provisions.

exhibits_deferred.name: Conversion Addenda
exhibits_deferred.reason: Applies only to conversion franchisees. Key fee terms (CLF/SPF rates) already surfaced in Item 6 footnotes.

exhibits_deferred.substance_elsewhere: Items 8, 11, and A2 technology clause summary
exhibits_deferred.remaining_missing: Individual vendor termination penalties, auto-renewal terms, data retention/rights, liability caps
